pred_reason: The contract contains a reentrancy vulnerability in the mint function due to unsafe external calls (SWC-107) and exhibits multiple access control failures allowing unauthorized minting and supply limit bypass (SWC-101). These findings align with the identified SWC labels based on concrete security issues. Evidence: Reentrancy confirmed in mint function via unsafe _safeMint calls (Finding 3); Critical access control issues permitting unauthorized minting (Finding 7); MAX_SUPPLY enforcement failure allowing total supply overflow (Finding 9)
